title: CKAN
subtitle: Open data portal platform used by governments and organizations worldwide
comments: CKAN does not publish a standard OpenAPI spec. Skyline uses a native adapter with 7 hardcoded actions (package_search, package_list, package_show, resource_show, datastore_search, organization_list, tag_list). Set spec_type to 'ckan' to activate the built-in adapter. Most CKAN portals do not require authentication for read access.
authNotes: Most CKAN portals allow anonymous read access. For write operations, an API key is required (usually found in your CKAN user profile settings).
